# BOS - Build Operating System

BOS is a Build Operating System for AI-assisted software development.

Primary public use case:
- Helping Base44 and AI coding builders make fewer broken app changes with project memory, focused checks, safer prompts, verified fixes, and publish-readiness guidance.

What BOS helps with:
- project memory;
- focused diagnostics and scans;
- safer build and fix prompts;
- targeted scans;
- receipt-backed fixes;
- platform advisories;
- publish-readiness checks;
- privacy-safe resolved-pattern learning;
- beta measurement of saved prompts, credits, and debugging loops.

Working beta value estimates:
- Internal BOS work across Build Companion/BC+, Drywise, Walkies, and Assessment Engine suggests BOS can be most useful when a feature or bug would otherwise create repeated broad AI repair loops.
- For meaningful bug or feature fixes, BOS should be measured against an estimated 2-6 avoided retry prompts, 30-120 minutes of troubleshooting time, and roughly 1.3-14+ avoidable broad-build credits per issue.
- For complex device, payment, map, auth, persistence, or platform-integration issues, the upside may be higher, but all savings language remains a beta estimate until measured pilot evidence exists.
- BOS should track prompt count, build-credit usage where available, elapsed time, repeated fix attempts, build/runtime errors, and receipt outcomes.

How BOS connects:
- Base44 app <-> Cloud BOS for direct app guidance.
- Base44 or other AI coding engines <-> GitHub <-> Codex/localBOS <-> Cloud BOS for code workflows.
- Detailed diagrams and data boundaries live at /public/how-it-works.html.

Beta access and premium-capable features:
- Commercial packaging is not final.
- Public guidance explains the workflow and basic checks.
- Private beta tests connected app onboarding, project memory, focused scans, safer prompts, receipts, and platform advisories.
- Premium-capable features such as deeper market guidance, design checks, Base44 hardening, Cloud BOS API access, onboarding support, and multi-project workflows are being proven and are not final tier names.

Possible future services:
- Guided repair sessions and formal hardening audits are not part of the current beta offer.
- If added later, they should be managed through an approved BOS service path as separately scoped service requests with owner approval, deliverables, receipts, and separate pricing.

Important caveats:
- BOS is a governance OS for safer AI-assisted development, not a warranty.
- BOS does not certify security, compliance, accessibility, legal readiness, or production fitness.
- Users remain responsible for review, testing, deployment, and professional advice.
- Cloud BOS should not receive raw source code, secrets, user data, raw logs, raw receipts, full prompts, full local project memory, or private development-pack material by default.

First beta:
- BOS Base44 and AI app build safety beta.
- Focused on practical app reliability and publish-readiness guidance, not enterprise certification.

- Requires qualified legal review before paid public launch.
